title: phyllanthus microphyllinus
intro: Phyllanthus microphyllinus, also known as the small-leaved phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus microphyllinus include its potential to reduce liver inflammation, improve liver function, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, extracts, and capsules, which are often used to support liver health and overall well-being.
